required_operator_inputs: prove whether Explaino-native Meta-Basin is or is not the next truthful bounded implementation lane on the merged head
name the exact owner seam, state model, classification output, and visible-control answer for the first truthful Meta-Basin lane or prove the lane is blocked
preserve SampleFractalPoints and FractalSampleResult as the shipped legacy projection surfaces unless exact proof forces a narrower future transition

keep sample-evidence widening, Counterfactual Pair, Projection-and-Flow, ExplainO-BalanceVoid, Operator-Itinerary, DSL/program-space, color-pipeline work, and generic engine refactor out of scope unless one tiny blocker seam is proved exactly
forbidden_operator_prompts: claim Explaino-native Meta-Basin is ready to implement without repo-grounded owner-seam proof
treat existing Explaino-family, widened-evidence, sidecar, or slime seams as Meta-Basin without proving controller-state attractor ownership
inherit visible Explaino controls without explicitly classifying each one as authoritative now, intentionally hidden now, or explicitly blocked with proof
replace SampleFractalPoints or FractalSampleResult instead of preserving the shipped legacy projection path on this viability slice

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Meta-Basin viability / owner-seam proof contract validates successfully
The Meta-Basin viability / owner-seam phased plan stays synchronized
The Meta-Basin viability / owner-seam hostile-audit validator passes
